Bus Timings

Complete Route and Stop Details for Sharjah Bus 15

September 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This service operates with regular intervals throughout the day, ensuring frequent access to key destinations within Sharjah. Whether you’re arriving at the airport or commuting within the city, Bus 15 offers a convenient way to navigate Sharjah’s bustling urban areas and reach notable locations.

Route Name 15
Route Description Sharjah Airport Terminal - Al Rolla Terminal
Total Distance Approximately 10-12 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 05:45 to 23:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website SRTA Gov

Bus Timings

Bus 15 operates with the following schedule:

  • From Sharjah Airport Terminal: 06:00 to 23:05, every 20 minutes

  • From Al Rolla Terminal: 05:45 to 23:10, every 20 minutes

These timings ensure that passengers have frequent and reliable service throughout the day, accommodating both early and late travel needs.

Also See: Discover Bus F15 Route and Stops in Dubai

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 15 is set at AED 5. This affordable ticket price provides cost-effective transportation options for passengers traveling across the various stops on the route. Additionally, the flat fare ensures straightforward budgeting for daily commutes or occasional trips. With its economical pricing, Bus 15 remains a popular choice for both regular and occasional travelers in Sharjah.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no online booking available for Bus 15. Passengers can pay for their fare directly upon boarding the bus. For the latest updates on service changes or ticketing options, it’s advisable to check local transportation resources or the Sharjah Transport website. Additionally, keeping an eye on any announcements at bus stations can help ensure you stay informed about any new developments.

Bus Route

The Bus 15 route is comprehensive, covering numerous significant stops across Sharjah. Here’s a complete list of the route:

  1. Sharjah Airport Terminal

  2. Airport Terminal Street

  3. Sharjah Airport Area C

  4. Sharjah Airport Area B

  5. Sharjah Airport Road Area A

  6. Al Gharayen 5 Area

  7. Sharjah Cooperative Society B

  8. Al Juraina 1, Sharjah Cooperative Society A

  9. University Road, Muwaileh Camp Road Area

  10. University South Exit

  11. University, Child Care Center

  12. Medical Campus & Police Academy

  13. American University of Sharjah

  14. Sharjah University College of Arts

  15. Sharjah University Mens College

  16. Sharjah University Boys Library

  17. Sharjah University Womens College

  18. University Road, Main Gate Area

  19. Muwaileh Camp Sharjah University R/A

  20. Muwaileh Camp Family Supermarket

  21. Emirates Petrol Bon Burger

  22. University Road, Glass Factory

Recommended Guides

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. University Road, Donut Office

  2. Third Industrial Street junction

  3. University Road, ENOC Petrol Station

  4. International School Of Choueifat

  5. Our Own English School

  6. University Road, Sharjah Cricket Stadium

  7. University Road, Vegetable market

  8. University Road, 120 Street Junction

  9. University Road, Baby Shop

  10. University Road, Shoemart

  11. Gold Center

  12. Golden Fork

  13. Spinneys

  14. Baladiya Office

  15. ADCB Bank

  16. Panasonic Tower

  17. Al Warqf Center

  18. Al Rolla Terminal

Explore the bus schedule and fare details for your journey from Sharjah to Salalah.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 15 in Sharjah serves a variety of locations, and several notable tourist attractions and destinations can be found along its route:

  1. American University of Sharjah: A prominent educational institution with a picturesque campus.

  2. Sharjah University: Includes multiple colleges and facilities, making it a key educational hub.

  3. Sharjah Cricket Stadium: A major venue for cricket matches and sports events.

4.

  1. Our Own English School: Another significant school with a strong educational reputation.

  2. Sharjah Cooperative Society B: A well-known retail outlet in Sharjah.

  3. Spinneys: A popular supermarket chain offering a wide range of goods.

  4. Golden Fork: A local restaurant that could be a dining spot for travelers.

These stops provide access to various cultural, educational, and leisure destinations, enhancing the utility of Bus 15 for both residents and visitors.

Read More: Guide to Bus 308 Route and Stops: Sharjah to Jebel Ali

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Al Rolla Terminal, the furthest point on the Bus 15 route, starting from Sharjah Airport Terminal. The fare for this journey typically ranges between AED 72 and AED 80, offering a straightforward and reliable option for reaching your destination comfortably. The app’s user-friendly interface also allows you to track your ride and ensure a smooth travel experience.

Bus 15 is a vital link in Sharjah’s public transport network, connecting major areas and institutions with ease and affordability. Whether you’re traveling for business or leisure, this bus service offers a practical solution for navigating the city. Its frequent service and wide coverage make it a convenient choice for both residents and visitors. By providing access to key destinations, Bus 15 helps streamline travel across Sharjah, contributing to a more connected and accessible urban environment.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 26, 2025.
